summary: Iteration 76: Tested Validation Management page restructure with Pending/Validated tabs, sub-tabs, search, list/grid views, rejection dialog, and validation history tracking. All backend (12/12) and frontend (12/12) tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend ValidationManagement.jsx correctly implements Pending/Validated main tabs with sub-tabs (Payments, Tickets, Services, Promotions)
ValidationSubPage component is reusable across all 8 sub-tabs with search, list/grid toggle, pagination, and bulk selection
Rejection dialog modal correctly displays with textarea for reason input (data-testid='reject-dialog', 'reject-reason-input')
Backend GET /api/validation/history returns type_counts for Validated tab badge counts
Validation actions are logged to validation_history collection with performed_by_name, performed_by_role, and timestamp
Validated tab correctly shows audit trail with 'By: [Name] ([role])' format
seed_data_creation: Used existing 36 pending payments for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validation page restructure complete. Main tabs (Pending/Validated) and sub-tabs (Payments, Tickets, Services, Promotions) working. Rejection dialog shows modal with textarea. Validated tab displays audit history with performer name. Backend /api/validation/history returns type_counts for badge numbers.

pending_tab_structure.main_tabs: Pending and Validated with count badges
pending_tab_structure.sub_tabs: Payments, Tickets, Services, Promotions each with item counts
pending_tab_structure.view_toggle: List/Grid view toggle buttons work correctly
pending_tab_structure.bulk_selection: Checkboxes visible on each item card

rejection_dialog.modal_display: Opens modal on Reject button click

backend_apis.GET /api/validation/pending: Returns all pending items with counts
